caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The setting appears to be a clothing store or a similar retail environment, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man gestures with his hand while speaking, indicating he is engaged in a conversation or delivering a monologue. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
